---
name: Customization request
about: Request help adapting the app to your specific BIM workflows
title: '[CUSTOM] '
labels: question, customization
assignees: ''

---

**What is your current BIM workflow?**
E.g., We use Solibri for checking and want to group clashes by zones instead of disciplines.

**What part of the BCF Wiki do you want to customize?**
- [ ] Topic categorization (new disciplines or tags)
- [ ] Wiki generation rules (LLM prompts)
- [ ] Backup / Storage mechanism
- [ ] Other

**Describe the customization**
Describe how you want the BCF Wiki to behave.
